basic_details.short_information: National Council of Science Museums (NCSM) has officially announced a Walk-in Interview for the recruitment of 1 Young Professional (Stores & Purchase) Posts. This walk-in drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Candidates with Bachelor Degree preferably in Science/Commerce qualification can directly attend the interview on 02 June 2026.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for NCSM Young Professional recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Young Professional (Stores & Purchase) post is scheduled for 02 June 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue on time.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Young Professional post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor Degree, preferably in Science or Commerce, to be eligible for the Young Professional (Stores & Purchase) position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Young Professional post is 35 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Young Professional role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 30,000 per month for the Young Professional (Stores & Purchase) position.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Young Professional post?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Walk-in Interview followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies, and recent passport-size photographs. Specific documents like ID proof and educational certificates are essential.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview venue located?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held in Kolkata, West Bengal, with the pincode 700091. The exact address will be available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent job?
faq.answer: No, this is a contract-based job for the Young Professional (Stores & Purchase) position at the National Council of Science Museums (NCSM).

faq.question: Q10. How many vacancies are available for the Young Professional post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Young Professional (Stores & Purchase) post in this recruitment drive.
